PRODUCT
& EXECUTION

I embrace a long-term mindset, bridging the gap between raw data and business execution.

THE BRIDGE

Project Management

I go beyond pure data analysis to connect insights with business goals, actively driving projects forward. My focus is to ensure data doesn't just sit in dashboards but informs product roadmaps and strategic decisions.

METHODOLOGY

User Stories & Agile

Experienced in agile workflows, I translate complex data requirements into clear, actionable User Stories. This ensures technical teams and business stakeholders maintain a unified vision and work efficiently towards shared objectives.

EXECUTION

Product Development

I have participated in the full lifecycle of SaaS product development driven by business needs, integrating AI-powered and automation features to enhance functionality, efficiency, and user experience. Leveraging my product and project management skills, I coordinate cross-functional teams—including UX, engineering, and business partners—to align on requirements and deliver on time.

COLLABORATION

Cross-Functional Alignment

I play a key role in incorporating continuous feedback, managing testing phases, resolving issues, and successfully launching products that meet evolving market demands. I bridge gaps between data, product, and engineering teams to ensure every decision is grounded in evidence.

PROJECT
PORTFOLIO
SELECTED WORKS
01
DATA INTELLIGENCE / FINTECH

Revenue & Operations Intelligence Platform

A comprehensive data intelligence platform designed to provide full-cycle visibility into revenue operations, from marketing attribution to customer retention.

  • Integrated CRM, sales, and payment data
  • Tracked CLV, retention, and campaign effectiveness
  • Contributed to dashboard design and metric definition
02
DATA INTEGRATION & VALIDATION / API / DATABASE

API Integration & Data Quality Assurance

Integrating external data sources through APIs and ensuring data consistency with internal databases. Analyzed API documentation, mapped fields, and performed validation.

  • 2,837 records validated; 5 missing, 4 discrepancies resolved
  • Reduced manual reconciliation efforts significantly
  • Coordinated with engineering and data teams
03
RISK CONTROL / FINTECH / OPERATIONS MONITORING

Transaction Risk Monitoring & Alert System

Analyzed transaction data and designed monitoring mechanisms to identify potential operational and financial risks with automated alert triggering.

  • Defined decline, chargeback, refund, and volume indicators
  • Designed threshold-based alert configuration
  • Reduced false positives through iterative threshold tuning
04
FINANCIAL / REVENUE MODELING

Revenue Forecasting & Business Performance Modeling

Data modeling project focused on forecasting revenue performance and evaluating the potential impact of business and operational changes.

  • Optimistic / Baseline / Pessimistic scenario modeling
  • Approval rate, retention, and conversion as key drivers
  • Projected +$210K potential revenue increase
VISION
AHEAD

Looking ahead, I am deeply committed to advancing my expertise at the intersection of AI, data-driven innovation, and business strategy. Building on my background in finance, fintech, and data analytics, along with hands-on experience in SaaS product development and product management, I am particularly interested in product strategy and how AI-powered automation can drive scalable, efficient, and user-centric solutions. I see strong potential in leveraging emerging technologies to translate complex data and business needs into intelligent products and impactful decisions at scale.

I look forward to continuing this journey by collaborating across disciplines, staying curious about advancements in AI and technology, and driving initiatives that combine analytical rigor, thoughtful product strategy, and business insight to create meaningful and sustainable impact.
